objective: Harden and finish the Tau loop, harness, TUI, inter-harness communication, and UX Lab chat surface using the working Tau receipts, the Watch chat UX at http://127.0.0.1:3002/#watch as the chat reference, and pi-mono existing inter-harness/transport patterns as the communication reference.

requirements.requirement: UX Lab must include a Tau chat surface that borrows from Watch/Sparta Chat UX and shows receipt-backed state, proof boundaries, and peer communication.

latest UI marker refreshed to url=http://127.0.0.1:3002/#tau; name=tau-goal-audit-refresh

does_not_prove: final production Sparta Chat engine integration

requirements.requirement: TUI/chat must handle Embry persona voice through PersonaPlex without falsely claiming unavailable audio synthesis.

evidence.observed: persona_voice.schema=tau.sparta_chat_persona_voice.v1; voice_engine=personaplex; voice_status=NOT_REQUESTED; claims.proves includes routing metadata preservation; claims.does_not_prove includes PersonaPlex audio synthesis and live full-duplex readiness
UI text states PersonaPlex is fail-closed voice metadata until a real cache replay receipt is attached

explicit_non_claims.detail: The objective names the UX Lab Tau chat surface, not replacement of final production Sparta Chat. This audit does not claim production Sparta Chat engine integration.

The objective requires Tau/TUI/chat to handle Embry PersonaPlex voice routing. This is satisfied as fail-closed routing metadata; this audit does not claim real audio synthesis or live full-duplex PersonaPlex readiness.

The objective requires inter-harness communication using pi-mono transport patterns. Delivery, WebSocket receive, ack, and inbox removal are proven. This audit does not claim a production pi-mono agent semantically processed the Tau receipt.

next_actions: Promote the experiment surface into final Sparta Chat only under a separate product-integration goal.
Attach a real PersonaPlex receipt only under a separate audio synthesis/live voice goal.
Add multi-target fanout only if a second named harness is introduced.
